features.name: Frenzy
features.summary: While raging, the Berserker can deal extra damage once per turn with Reckless Attack.

features.name: Cutting Words
features.summary: The Bard can use Bardic Inspiration to reduce a creature's D20 Test or damage roll.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.summary: The Cleric improves healing from spells and gains the Life Domain spell package.

features.name: Land's Aid
features.summary: The Druid channels land magic to harm foes and heal allies in an area.

features.name: Improved Critical
features.summary: The Fighter scores a Critical Hit on a wider attack-roll range.

features.name: Open Hand Technique
features.summary: The Monk adds control riders to Flurry of Blows attacks.

features.name: Sacred Weapon
features.summary: The Paladin uses Channel Divinity to imbue a weapon with divine power.

features.name: Hunter's Prey
features.summary: The Ranger chooses a combat benefit that improves attacks against chosen prey.

features.name: Fast Hands
features.summary: The Rogue expands Cunning Action with quick object and tool interactions.

features.name: Draconic Resilience
features.summary: The Sorcerer gains draconic durability and improved Armor Class support.

features.name: Dark One's Blessing
features.summary: When the Warlock or an ally within 10 feet reduces an enemy to 0 Hit Points, the Warlock gains Temporary Hit Points equal to Charisma modifier plus Warlock level, minimum 1.

features.name: Fiend Spells
features.summary: The Fiend Patron always prepares Burning Hands, Command, Scorching Ray, and Suggestion at level 3.

features.name: Potent Cantrip
features.summary: The Evoker improves damaging cantrips when targets avoid their full effect.
